cases.input: Design a read-only config validation skill with Glob/Grep/Read tools and six procedure steps.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a complete skill design spec with least-privilege tools, procedure steps, quality criteria, anti-patterns, edge cases, and MOAT score.

cases.input: Design a generation skill that creates a report draft and needs Write with documented rationale.
cases.expected_behavior: Allows Write only because the procedure requires a generated draft and tool rationale explains it.

cases.input: Design a skill named Data Cleaner Pro.
Design a read-only audit skill but include Write and Bash just in case.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks unnecessary tools and enforces least privilege.

cases.input: Design a skill with two procedure steps.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks because procedure requires 5-10 structured steps.

cases.input: Use quality criteria like output is good and works well.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects vague criteria and requires measurable pass/fail thresholds.

cases.input: Design a skill with no edge cases.
Design a skill with a MOAT score of 60.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks until the design reaches at least 75.
Does not activate because no skill design is requested.

quality_criteria: anti-patterns and edge cases meet minimums
